description: With Workato, we can automate repetitive tasks in our marketing campaigns, which allows us to save valuable time and resources. Its ability to integrate with a wide range of applications and systems facilitates data synchronization, workflow automation, and the creation of a consolidated view of our customers.
author: Karen M.
pros: Workato offers the capability to integrate and automate workflows across a wide variety of applications and systems, thereby achieving the interconnection of marketing tools such as CRM, automation platforms, web analytics, and social media.
cons: There are no negative or problematic aspects of this tool that I have identified.

description: It was good and satisfying , Though we are not using it anymore rather move to APIgee Universal setup
author: Samna N.
pros: Flexible and Robust middleware configurations on integrating ITIS tools like Servicenow and Salesforce specially following points: 1. Drag and Drop feature for configuring field mappings maintained for inter tool communication 2. One click set up on API configurations and validate user credentials 3. Default configurations available for Most popular ITIS tools
cons: Not much configurations available for relatively new tools like flexera, Devops CI/CD tools etc. Need more manual configurations

review_title: Workato - A dynamic online integration platform
description: Workato is a dynamic online integration platform which we use to automate processes from Bulk editing/deleting records to exporting data and reimporting csv files back into TrackVia. As a result, it saves a lot of time from having to manually perform these tasks. Additionally, it has the ability to connect our TrackVia account with external platforms such as Slack, Dropbox, Wufoo, Gmail, Google Docs and other applications. is great for automating data from one platform to another.
author: Saleem B.
pros: Creating a basic recipe in Workato is quite easy due to not having the need to write code as it is a no code/low code platform which is great for non-technical users.
cons: Integrations which are complex, have a few actions or functions require more knowledge which can be acquired from Workato Academy courses or from Workato Documentation.

author: Maria U.
pros: From process automation to cloud management, Workato offers great features and has always delivered. I also like it is secure, scalable, and management and customization is easy too.
cons: Workato is the best I have used. No complaints.

description: In general my experience has been very good, Workato has been a key tool to improve our productivity and operational efficiency. The automation of repetitive tasks has allowed us to save valuable time thtat is now dedicated to more impactful tasks. However, the tool is not without its challenges, the learning curve is a bit slow.
author: Pedro S.
pros: What I like most about Workato is its ability to integrate a wide variety of business applications seamlessly. The tool allows connecting platforms such as Salesforce, is easy to use and is intuitive.
cons: Although the interface is intuitive, the first few days were somewhat challenging. Some more complex workflows require a learning time to fully understand how to configure automations, especially when it comes to more technical integrations.

review_title: User-Friendly and Flexible Automation Platform with Enterprise Power
description: I have a very positive experience with Workato, is a powerful integration and automation platform that strikes a good balance between ease of use and flexibility.
author: Swathi J.
pros: I think the biggest strength is its no-code/low-code approach for building integrations. It's very intuitive for non-developers while still offering advanced features for technical users.
cons: The pricing is very expensive when I have a lot of connections or need higher-tier features. UI is friendly large or nested workflows can get hard to read and maintain.

review_title: Helpful in synchronizing our different procedures
author: Christ M.
pros: The existence of multiple pre-built connectors in Workato made it easy for me to connect our CRM, and ERP, and the modes of communication. This created end-to-end data integration, the achievement of which has improved our decision-making systems and customer relations.​
cons: I saw that some connectors lacked further configuration and that could be used in specific scenarios.

description: Overall experience with Workato has been quite positive till now to be fair. I like all the features and how it allows the user to be creative and productive at the same time.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The whole automation process is smooth and very reliable which also always comes in handy while working with the software. Cloud management is also a plus point of this software.
cons: The downside was its pricing. I felt like it could be reduced as it accumulates to a large amount over a period of time. Customisation may also feel limited in some cases.

description: My experience with Workato has been highly positive. The platform is intuitive and powerful, allowing both technical and non-technical users to build robust integrations and automations across a wide range of applications. I particularly appreciate the low-code/no-code interface, which makes it easy to create workflows without extensive programming knowledge. Workato’s extensive library of connectors and pre-built recipes significantly speeds up implementation and reduces the need for custom development. The real-time data syncing and error-handling capabilities are reliable and efficient, and the platform scales well with growing business needs.
author: Kaltoum A.
pros: I like the simplicity of platform,I can easy use
cons: Unfortunately I Can't cache large datasets and it's expensive for a small company

description: It is really a valuable in tool to organise your business operations through automation. However learning curve is bit steep but can help business to become more efficient.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is for sure a great work tool, it is really the way it integrates with other apps, and makes your work easy, like setting up automation triggers for new leads is really cool one.
cons: Yes nice but prices also the price structure increases depending on the number of transactions or actions like more you use more you have to pay.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Put you on a challenging career path and use it against you for any missteps, all while gaslighting you into believing you should be grateful for the opportunity
author: Soumyakant D.
pros: Great culture and learning curve Workato makes it easy for IT and business teams to orchestrate their applications, data, and experiences.
cons: This side gives a better work growth.Progress doesn't come from standing still. It comes from linking ideas, systems, and people in smarter, more powerful ways.

description: Excellent experience with Workato. Easy to use and very effective.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: With the use of automation, workato makes work easier and enjoyable. I highly recommend workato.
cons: Nothing bad noted. I recommend workato to everyone.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: My over experience with Workato was amazing
author: James S.
pros: I loved the quote to cash workflow and the different AI tools it offers
cons: Actually, I like evreything about Workato
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A one stop solution for integration
author: Oluchi E.
pros: It enables seamless integration of applications, data, and experiences. Has made it easy to move records from one SaaS application to another. It’s technical support is amazing.
cons: It works extremely well nothing to dislike.

description: I will continue to use it for now
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I use this software to connect to our business. It meets our needs and I find it cool
cons: Not having a free version is not a good thing

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We're able to pilot and test new workflows, build upon them, then productize them as a service, which can be used by our consulting team.
cons: Requests for adding new features(actions and triggers) to an existing Connector can be subject to their own priorities, and may not be addressed even with a substantial use-case.

description: The easy tool which is used for automating the process with great desired outcomes.
author: Jothika K.
pros: It is a drag and drop interface and it is easy to use.100+ Prebuilt connectors make this tool easier.This tool ensures security and scalability.
cons: It is much harder to use without programming experience when we have to work with the API application.Maintenance of recipes is quite challenging.

review_title: The tool I was looking for!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I'm a huge google fan but sometimes not everything was linked with other programs. Workato came to my rescue! Now almost seemlessly everything is synchronized. I no longer need to manually update several databases. Price is awesome for us non-profit. I shared with them some improvements, and there was some adjustments at the beginning but overall it is totally worth it!
cons: Some tips could be shared when creating a specific recipe. for example; don't share your google sheet with too many people or the recipe won't work. Or Don't delete a line or the recipe will not work for the next registration,...

author: Viveka P.
pros: Workato tool has a user-friendly interface, and it is a low-code platform where much programming knowledge is not required. It reduces users' time and effort by providing pre-built recipes for popular applications like Salesforce, Freshdesk, etc. Integration with different applications is made easy and it provides good customer support where they help us when we are stuck. Documentations and video lectures are available which help new learners to grab the tool quickly.
cons: The only con which I experienced during development is, it hangs sometimes.

description: Workato is a low-code integration tool
author: Sriram G.
pros: Workato is an API-merged cloud-based software tool, it contains 600 pre-built apps with all types of categories like AI Machine learning, DevOps, Productivity, Operations, etc. We can easily deploy our recipe and share it via a link so that we can easily access it to test the recipe. It is low code integration tool.
cons: Sometimes we cannot be able to connect the pre-built apps because they need proper API keys and credentials. Only technical users will be able to create the connector SDK to customize the recipe of the application.

author: Russell H.
pros: We were looking for an integration solution and Workato was great to work with during the process. I was given a free trial and a support person to work with as I tried out the product. I only felt support in my decsion making process and never any pressure to purchase. This sales strategy worked great for me! The recipe building process is very easy to learn without much "developing" experience. The "expert hour" webinars are invaluable to work out the details. Once I decided to go with Workato, I was assigned an expert to work with me to get set-up. The same person worked with me and was invaluable in helping me get going! Now it just runs in the background and everything is integrated, MAGIC!
cons: The biggest challenge I have had working with Workato has been trying to figure out why an error has occurred.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: great, will continue to use to automate as much as possible
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: great tool for the unsophisticated or sophisticated end user and one i find myself using quite often
cons: could have more SMB functionality as it applies to the ability for the user to work in multiple flows

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I've only had one issue so far and it was resolved quickly and professionally. Representatives are very helpful and knowledgeable. Great customer service!
cons: Might help if transaction limits/balance was displayed on the main recipe dashboard. It's possible to run out of transactions with one recipe if you have a lot of data and don't set up a trigger properly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We had a former provider that tried hard, but their service did not work. Workato just plain works. Allan was great to provide us with the Professional Services to help us get our initial syncing processes built and tweaked to perfection. There have even been several feature requests we have suggested and they have added them quickly. We use Workato to create new quickbooks customers as soon as they are a client in Salesforce, as well as creating in and updating invoices in salesforce as soon as they are created or updated in Quickbooks. This allows our entire company to edit and view in Salesforce and not have to have access to quickbooks.
author: Ryan H.
pros: There have even been several feature requests we have suggested and they have added them quickly.
cons: It still requires some manual work when a syncing error happens and has to be resolved.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Made my life at work easier
author: Musa N.
pros: It can integrate and connects almost with all my applications i work with at my office. And It just get things done
cons: There is a lot i need to understand and learn before i can master it. Some documentations would really be helpful
author_profession: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
